intro: 5 magical dress-up games in one adorable collection. Create princess, fairy, fashion, and doll looks with outfits, hairstyles, and accessories made for kids.
description:
Step into a world of sparkle, style, and imagination with Princess Dress Up Collection: 5 Games in 1.
This charming collection brings together five adorable dress-up games in one easy-to-enjoy package for kids who love princesses, fairy magic, fashion looks, and creative doll styling.
Mix and match dresses, hairstyles, accessories, and colorful outfits to create beautiful looks across five different themes:
• Princess Dress Up
• Indian Princess: Dress Up!
• Little Fairy Dress Up
• Model Style: Dress Up!
• Doll Style: Underground Design and Dress
From royal gowns and fairy wings to trendy outfits and playful doll makeovers, there is always a new style to discover. The unified menu makes it simple to jump between games and enjoy a huge variety of dress-up fun in one place.
Why kids will love it:
• 5 dress-up games in 1 collection
• Princess, fairy, fashion, and doll themes
• Lots of outfits, hairstyles, and accessories
• Easy pick-up-and-play creative fun
• Great value compared with buying the games separately
Perfect for young players who enjoy princess games, fashion games, doll games, and cute creative experiences on Nintendo Switch™.
